name: Cracked Wheat-Honey Bread
recipeIngredient: Cracked wheat - set aside. Let cool to lukewarm. (Note: about as long as it takes to do the rest of the recipe.)
Whole wheat flour: 3/4 cup (1 cup, 1 1/2 cup)
Active dry yeast: 1 tsp (1 tsp, 1 tsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a large bowl except the cracked wheat.
2. Reserve the cracked wheat and let it cool to lukewarm.
3. Mix in the cracked wheat slowly while stirring until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan.
5. Bake at medium temperature for about 30-40 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped.
6. Brush top with additional honey before serving.
Comments: This recipe produces a heavy texture with a chewy crumb.
